name: SWS Mu Quantization Small-Cap Stock Fund(LOF)
summary: SWS Mu Quantization Small-Cap Stock Fund(LOF) is a stock fund that focuses on investing in small-cap companies using a quantitative approach and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in undervalued small-cap stocks through quantitative analysis. It is managed by SWS MU Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
